summary: Comprehensive testing of WhatToEat pregnancy nutrition app. Verified the bottom navigation fix (bottom: 30px CSS offset), all 4 navigation tabs, Premium page functionality, and backend IAP endpoints. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Health endpoint returns healthy status
BACKEND: /api/iap/verify-purchase with invalid receipt returns proper error (code 21002)
BACKEND: /api/iap/verify-purchase with empty receipt returns failure response
BACKEND: /api/iap/premium-status without auth returns is_premium: false, message: 'Not authenticated'
BACKEND: /api/iap/premium-status with invalid token returns proper error
BACKEND: /api/iap/restore-purchases without receipt returns failure
BACKEND: /api/foods/all returns food list with is_premium flags
BACKEND: /api/categories returns category list
BACKEND: /api/safety-levels returns SAFE, LIMIT, AVOID
BACKEND: /api/foods/search?query=apple returns matching foods
BACKEND: /api/foods/{id} returns specific food details
FRONTEND: App loads successfully with onboardingStep=5
FRONTEND: WhatToEat logo visible in header
FRONTEND: Bottom navigation has all 4 tabs (Home, FAQ, Topics, About)
FRONTEND: Bottom nav CSS has bottom: 30px offset above Made with Emergent badge
FRONTEND: Bottom nav z-index: 900 ensures visibility
FRONTEND: Search bar visible on home page
FRONTEND: 13 category filter pills displayed
FRONTEND: 4 safety filter pills (All, Safe, Limit, Avoid)
FRONTEND: FAQ page loads with search bar and category filters
FRONTEND: FAQ page shows premium locked items with lock icons
FRONTEND: Topics page loads with premium locked topics (12 items)
FRONTEND: About page loads with version, features, data sources, disclaimer
FRONTEND: Premium page shows purchase button ($1.99)
FRONTEND: Premium page shows Restore Purchases button
FRONTEND: Premium page shows benefits list (24 high-risk foods, 39 limit foods, 186 safe foods)
MOBILE: Bottom nav visible at y=741, within 844px viewport
MOBILE: All 4 nav tabs visible and clickable
MOBILE: Made with Emergent badge does not obscure navigation
seed_data_creation: None required - used localStorage to skip onboarding (onboardingStep=5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottom navigation bug is fixed. The .bottom-nav CSS has bottom: 30px to offset above the Made with Emergent badge. All 4 navigation tabs (Home, FAQ, Topics, About) are visible and clickable on both desktop and mobile. The Premium page is a separate view without bottom nav (accessed via Topics -> Unlock Premium or from premium locked items). Apple IAP endpoints return proper error responses for invalid receipts (code 21002). MOCKED: Frontend Apple IAP purchase flow on web shows alert directing users to iOS app - real IAP only works on native iOS.
mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: The Apple IAP frontend flow uses mock data when running on web (non-native). The 'Get Premium for $1.99' button shows an alert message directing users to the iOS app. Real IAP only works on iOS native app with Capacitor.
